summary: Large chat screen Activity coordinating session init, message observation, optimistic overlays, viewport state, composer, emoji panel, reply/edit flow, recording delegation, group actions and previews.
Owns chat emoji panel setup, keyboard inset transitions, emoji panel height animation, keyboard show/hide and persisted keyboard height state for ChatActivity.
Owns RecyclerView viewport operations for ChatActivity: anchor capture/restore, unread visible range calculation, scroll-to-message/bottom, scroll button visibility and scroll-state persistence.
Package-level scroll anchor containing message id, fallback index and pixel offset for stable chat viewport restoration.
Owns selected reply target, reply preview UI binding, reply preview text/image formatting, source-message jump/highlight and clearing reply when a deleted message matches.

Stateful local message overlay and optimistic edit store for ChatActivity, including merge/prune/sync with server messages, local-to-server id mapping, optimistic message builders and pending edit replacements.
Owns inline edit state and UI binding for ChatActivity, including selected edit message, removed existing photo URLs, edit strip labels, edit start/cancel/finish and edited photo source calculation.
Package-level inline edit state with original message and resolved server message id.
Package-level photo draft preview model shared by ChatActivity and inline edit controller.

Owns voice/video recording UI state, long-press gesture handling, permission continuation, MediaRecorder setup, CameraX video capture, camera switching, recording ticker and temp-file finalize/cancel behavior for ChatActivity.
RecyclerView adapter for message rows, including bind logic for text/photos/voice/replies/status and delegation to round video binder/player controller for inline circular video playback.
Binds voice message row UI: play/stop/preparing glyph, duration/progress bar, disabled alpha and click handlers for incoming and outgoing rows.
Small immutable state object for voice playback row rendering.
Formats media duration in milliseconds as m:ss for voice and video message UI.
Binds Telegram-like round video message rows: circular thumbnail/TextureView media, progress ring, duration and play/pause/preparing overlay, plus attach/detach callbacks for inline playback.
Owns one-at-a-time inline round video playback with MediaPlayer + TextureView, center-crop transform, progress ticks, pause/resume, recycle and lifecycle release behavior.
Immutable playback state for binding round video rows: active/preparing/playing booleans plus duration and progress milliseconds.
Background MediaMetadataRetriever thumbnail loader with small memory cache for round video message first frames.
Custom View drawing circular track and progress arc used by recording preview and round video message rows.
FrameLayout that clips children to an oval outline/path for circular camera preview, TextureView video playback and thumbnails.
Binds single photo and multi-photo album rows, including caption visibility, thumbnail loading, tap callbacks and fallback text handling.
Resolved photo metadata for album layout, including original index, dimensions and portrait/aspect helpers.
Computed GridLayout tile placement and dimensions for message photo albums.
Binds reply preview row UI: visibility, fallback sender label, reply text, optional thumbnail, text hiding for photo fallback and preview tap callback.
Formats outgoing message status text and color from send state, delivered/read recipients, current user and group/direct chat mode.
Immutable text/color pair for outgoing message status UI.
SharedPreferences facade for server/session data, cached messages and scroll state, updates, pinned/hidden chats/messages, remembered accounts and FCM token sync state.
SharedPreferences-backed chat message snapshot store used by SessionStore facade, including per-user/per-chat cache keys, index trimming, JSON serialization and parsing.
SharedPreferences-backed update state collaborator for SessionStore facade, covering available update, last seen update, downloaded update path and raw updates info cache.
SharedPreferences-backed remembered accounts collaborator for SessionStore facade, including JSON parsing/saving, per-server filtering, account restore lookup and account removal.
SharedPreferences-backed pinned/hidden state collaborator for SessionStore facade, covering pinned chats/order, hidden chats and hidden messages with per-user key prefixes.
Chat network/cache repository exposing observers, chat/user/group operations, message send/edit/delete/read, media upload and JSON parsing.
JSON parser helper for ChatRepository, including chat previews, group info, chat messages, send-response message payloads and media/reply fallback fields.
In-memory chat message cache helper for ChatRepository with lazy SessionStore snapshot loading, persisted snapshot saving and cached message replacement.
Media upload/send helper for ChatRepository covering voice/photo/video upload fallbacks and voice/photo/video message payload construction.
Global Flask app with health, static uploads, updates, auth, profile, push, chat, message and media routes.
Initializes SQLite schema and compatibility columns for users, sessions, chats, messages, push tokens and update-related state.
Initializes SQLite schema, additive compatibility columns and required upload/update directories for backend server startup.
Adds a SQLite column when it does not already exist, used for additive schema compatibility migrations.
Decorator that resolves bearer/session auth and populates request user context for protected routes.
Builds chat list JSON payloads for the requesting user, including group/direct metadata and latest-message data.
Builds client-facing message JSON, including text, reply metadata, media URLs, status and read recipient state.
Owns Firebase initialization, push token trimming, message notification payloads, multicast send and async dispatch for backend push behavior.
Runs push notification fanout outside the request path using a fresh SQLite connection.
Creates push token register/unregister Blueprint with injected auth, DB, clock and PushService dependencies.
Creates auth Blueprint URL bindings for register, login and authenticated me handlers injected by `server.py`.
Creates users/profile Blueprint URL bindings for list users, update profile and update avatar handlers injected by `server.py`.
Creates `/api/updates` Blueprint with injected DB, normalization, feed loading, visibility and response-builder dependencies.
Creates uploaded media static routes and chat voice/photo/video upload route bindings with injected handlers and auth decorator.
Creates chat Blueprint URL bindings for chat list/create/group/member/message/read handlers injected by `server.py`.
Validates and stores voice/photo/video multipart uploads with caller-provided limits, suffix policy, timestamp and token generator.
Validates and stores profile avatar multipart uploads as generated `.jpg` files.
Deletes local uploaded files by name while ignoring blank values, remote URLs, missing files and unlink errors.
Builds chat preview and message JSON payloads with injected URL normalizers, fallback texts and parser helpers.
Provides chat membership checks, group info payloads and per-user chat title resolution for `server.py` wrappers.
Updates chat member read/delivered timestamps monotonically and returns the read-marker API payload.
Builds uploaded media URLs plus shared media URL list, integer list, int parsing and reply preview formatting helpers.
Formats SQLite user rows for client JSON and parses `u123` style user ids.
Small validation exception carrying a stable reason code for route-level error response mapping.
Normalizes login values for auth, user search and update targeting by trimming and lowercasing.
Hashes passwords using the existing salt$sha256(salt:password) storage format.
Verifies a password against the existing encoded password hash format.
Creates a URL-safe bearer token and inserts the session row with caller-provided timestamp.
Loads and normalizes update feed history records, including version metadata, changes and login/IP targeting rules.
Applies normalized login/IP allow and block lists to decide whether an update feed item is visible to a request.
Builds `/api/updates` response entries with stable fields, APK URL, file size and SHA-256 fallback derivation.
Loads chat ids for a member, delegates preview serialization, sorts by timestamp descending and returns the chat-list API payload.
Marks a member delivered, loads recent chat messages in stable order, delegates serialization and returns the message-list API payload.
Returns an existing direct chat id or creates the chat, direct pair row and member rows with unchanged schema fields.
Creates a group chat row and member rows for a de-duplicated member id set using unchanged schema fields.
Updates a group chat avatar filename and timestamp using unchanged chats table fields.
Validates and stores group chat avatar uploads using the existing chat_{chat_id}_{token}.jpg filename format.
Inserts a group member row, advances the chat timestamp and commits using unchanged schema fields.
Removes the current member from a group, deletes one-member chats or reassigns creator before returning the leave API payload.
Deletes a target member from a group, advances chat timestamp and commits using unchanged schema fields.
Deletes an authorized message, updates the chat timestamp, removes local media files and returns the delete API payload.
Updates editable message fields, advances chat timestamp, reloads the joined message row and returns the edit API payload.
Inserts a message, updates chat/member read-delivery timestamps, reloads the joined row and returns payload plus push metadata.
Loads reply target metadata and formats stable sender/text preview fields for message send payloads.
Builds bounded image width/height scalar and JSON-list values for single images and albums.
Updates a user's display name timestamp and returns the refreshed user row.
Updates a user's avatar filename timestamp and returns the refreshed user row plus previous avatar filename.
Loads searchable users, excludes the current user, delegates user JSON serialization and returns the user-list API payload.
